treatments.name: Lip Blush
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Lip Enhancement
treatments.intro: Wake up with beautifully enhanced lips every day.
treatments.description: Lip Blush is a semi-permanent cosmetic treatment that enhances your natural lip colour, improves lip definition, and creates the appearance of fuller, more youthful lips — without fillers. Perfect for anyone wanting soft, natural-looking lips with less need for daily lipstick.
treatments.note: A top-up appointment is required 6–8 weeks after your initial treatment for all semi-permanent make-up procedures. This perfecting session allows us to assess the healed results, reinforce the pigment where needed, and ensure the best possible colour, shape, and longevity.

treatments.name: Powder Brows
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Makeup
treatments.intro: Soft, shaded brows with long-lasting colour and definition.
treatments.description: Powder Brows create a soft, beautifully shaded makeup effect that enhances your natural brows with long-lasting colour and definition. This treatment is suitable for all skin types and can be customised from a subtle, natural finish to a more defined, makeup look.
benefits: Defines and enhances your brow shape
Saves time on your daily makeup routine
treatments.note: A top-up appointment is required 6–8 weeks after your initial treatment for all semi-permanent make-up procedures. This perfecting session ensures the best colour retention, shape, and overall results.

treatments.name: Combo Brows
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Makeup
treatments.intro: Hair strokes and soft shading for defined, natural brows.
treatments.description: Combo Brows combine delicate hair strokes at the front of the brows with soft powder shading through the body and tail, creating beautifully defined yet natural-looking brows. This technique offers the perfect balance between realism and a polished makeup finish.
benefits: Combines natural hair strokes with soft shading
Ideal for sparse or uneven brows
Customised to suit your face and style
Reduces the need for daily brow makeup
treatments.note: A top-up appointment is required 6–8 weeks after your initial treatment for all semi-permanent make-up procedures. This perfecting session ensures the best colour retention, shape, and longevity.

treatments.name: Stroke Brows
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Makeup (nano)
treatments.intro: Fine, realistic hair-like strokes that mimic natural brow hairs.
treatments.description: Stroke Brows use fine, realistic hair-like strokes to recreate the appearance of natural eyebrow hairs. This technique is ideal for enhancing shape, filling sparse areas, and achieving soft, natural-looking brows.
benefits: Customised to complement your facial features
Reduces the need for daily brow makeup
treatments.note: A top-up appointment is required 6–8 weeks after your initial treatment for all semi-permanent make-up procedures. This perfecting session ensures the best colour retention, shape, and longevity.

treatments.name: Lash Enhancement Eyeliner
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Makeup
treatments.intro: A subtle, fuller-looking lash line — without the look of eyeliner.
treatments.description: Lash Enhancement Eyeliner is a subtle semi-permanent treatment that places pigment between the lashes to create the illusion of a fuller, darker lash line. It enhances your eyes without the look of traditional eyeliner, giving a naturally defined appearance.
benefits: Creates the appearance of thicker, fuller lashes
Enhances the natural shape of your eyes
Saves time on your daily makeup routine

treatments.name: Classic Eyeliner
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Makeup
treatments.intro: Perfectly defined eyeliner every day, customised to your eyes.
treatments.description: Classic Eyeliner is a semi-permanent makeup treatment that creates a beautifully defined eyeliner look, enhancing the shape and definition of your eyes. The thickness and style can be customised, from a fine, elegant line to a more defined eyeliner effect.
benefits: Enhances the natural shape of the eyes
Creates perfectly defined eyeliner every day
Ideal for active lifestyles and sensitive eyes
Saves time on your daily makeup routine

treatments.name: Butterfly Eyeliner
treatments.subtitle: Semi-Permanent Makeup
treatments.intro: A lifted, winged effect that elongates and glamorises the eyes.
treatments.description: Butterfly Eyeliner is a beautifully lifted eyeliner style designed to enhance and elongate the eyes with a soft, elegant wing. This semi-permanent treatment creates a glamorous yet timeless look, customised to complement your eye shape and facial features.
benefits: Creates a lifted, winged eyeliner effect
Defines the lash line for a fuller appearance
Customised to suit your eye shape
Saves time on your daily makeup routine
treatments.note: A top-up appointment is required 6–8 weeks after your initial treatment for all semi-permanent make-up procedures. This perfecting session ensures the best colour retention, shape, and longevity.

treatments.name: Bubble Facial
treatments.subtitle: Deep-Cleansing & Oxygenating
treatments.intro: A fresh, healthy glow and beautifully cleansed skin.
treatments.description: The Bubble Facial is a deep-cleansing, oxygenating treatment that gently removes impurities while hydrating and refreshing the skin. The rich micro-bubbles help cleanse pores, improve circulation, and leave your complexion looking brighter, smoother, and more radiant.
benefits: Deeply cleanses the skin and pores
Leaves the skin soft, smooth, and refreshed

treatments.name: The Carbon Facial
treatments.subtitle: Advanced Laser Treatment
treatments.intro: Deep cleansing, brightening and collagen stimulation in one.
treatments.description: The Carbon Facial is an advanced laser treatment that deeply cleanses, exfoliates, and rejuvenates the skin. A layer of medical-grade carbon is applied to the skin before being targeted with a laser, removing impurities while stimulating collagen production for a smoother, brighter complexion. Suitable for oily, combination, acne-prone, and dull skin.
benefits: Minimises the appearance of enlarged pores
Brightens dull skin and evens skin tone
Softens fine lines and improves skin texture

treatments.name: HIFU
treatments.subtitle: High-Intensity Focused Ultrasound
treatments.intro: Lift and tighten — no needles, no surgery, no downtime.
treatments.description: HIFU uses High-Intensity Focused Ultrasound to stimulate collagen production deep within the skin, lifting, tightening and sculpting the face and body. Results build gradually over 2–3 months and continue to improve, with no needles and no downtime.
benefits: Sculpts and contours face and body

treatments.name: Brows & Waxing
treatments.subtitle: Shaping, Tinting, Lamination & Lashes
treatments.intro: Quick treatments with an instant payoff.
treatments.description: Lamination, HD brows, lash lifts and precision waxing — quick treatments with an instant result. Brows shaped and tinted to suit your face, lashes lifted without extensions, skin left smooth.
benefits: Brows shaped and tinted to frame your face
Lash lift for lifted, curled lashes without extensions

treatments.name: IPL Treatments
treatments.subtitle: Intense Pulsed Light
treatments.intro: Light that works — lasting hair reduction and skin rejuvenation.
treatments.description: Intense Pulsed Light delivers lasting results — permanent hair reduction for face and body, plus skin rejuvenation targeting wrinkles, acne, pigmentation and vascular concerns. Safe, effective and tailored to your skin after a patch test. See the full price list below for the complete hair-removal menu.
benefits: Permanent hair reduction for face and body
Improves acne, pigmentation and vascular concerns
Tailored to your skin after a patch test
